data.body: Fable reconciler session (resumes c18e-6b87-cde8-4148): resolved the epic bbf1 design wall. Decision: canonical-comparison principle — core diffs only in canonical/local shape; vendor shapes cross core as opaque payloads via port calls at boundaries (InboundMapper ingestion, OutboundMapper emission). Restructured the epic: 97f2 re-scoped to scalar port surface (project/query_project/assert_env_ready/BackendEnvError/BackendAssigneeNotFoundError); new children 625b (canonical field+label+baseline diff, resolve_assignee 3-state contract, map_fields_to_remote, ADR §(d) amendment), eefd (canonical link diff), aff0 (SupportsAbsenceProbe), 21ca (rich-text/comment limits via FieldSanitizer/InboundMapper), ad44 (reconcile_check canonicalization, depends_on 625b). Follow-up 556a (relocate inbound_fields.py) filed discovered_from, out of epic scope. Gerrit change 920 ABANDONED (scalar subset cherry-pickable from worktree impl-4af8-differ-di). Epic + all six open children hold certified plan-review PASS attestations. Next: execute via /rebar-implement — suggested order 97f2/aff0/21ca (independent), 625b, then eefd + ad44.
